label: Fraud Externality Verification Profile
description: Profile that treats fraud as a cost externality produced by missing verification infrastructure, weak issuer accountability, registry weakness, and governance capture.

nodes.label: Registry
nodes.description: Admission and removal authority for issuers or trusted claims

nodes.label: Verifier
nodes.description: Party evaluating identity, claim, provenance, and authority evidence

nodes.label: Affected Relying Party
nodes.description: Party that absorbs the cost of unverifiable claims or forged authority

nodes.label: Governance Authority
nodes.description: Institution responsible for anti-capture and remediation controls
